findings.title: Container diagram shows PostgreSQL but code uses MongoDB
findings.code_says: src/db/client.js connects to MongoDB via mongoose
findings.evidence: src/db/client.js:12 imports 'mongoose'; no postgres driver in package.json
findings.issue: Container diagram claims PostgreSQL but the code connects to MongoDB.
findings.why_it_matters: Architecture docs misrepresent the system, misleading any reader.
findings.suggested_fix: Update l2-c4-container.md to reflect MongoDB (or migrate to PostgreSQL).

findings.title: Rate-limit behavior not documented
findings.issue: Spec omits rate limiting, but middleware enforces it.
findings.why_it_matters: Clients hitting the limit will see surprising 429s.
findings.suggested_fix: Add a rate-limits section to behavioral-spec.md.
